title: Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month!
summary: A roundup of major AI developments including Google Remy (a new Gemini agent), Grok 5, Anthropic Mythos 1, Boston Dynamics Atlas upgrade, and DeepSeek price cuts. The video emphasizes a broader shift toward AI agents capable of working, coding, seeing, and adapting across multiple companies.
